mood: Warm, efficient, premium cafe experience, inviting yet highly structured
design_philosophy: Fusion of functional clarity (POS needs speed) with warm, organic coffee shop aesthetics. Avoid sterile 'fintech' blues and grays. Instead, use earthy tones like bone-white, terracotta, and espresso. The UI should feel like a tactile, high-end wooden cafe counter.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense tabular data and product cards. Center-align empty states and login dialogs.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D97757] text-white hover:bg-[#BF6245] transition-colors rounded-xl font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F1EA] text-[#2C1E16] hover:bg-[#EAE5D9] transition-colors rounded-xl font-medium border border-[#EAE5D9]
buttons.ghost: text-[#5C4A3D] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] hover:text-[#2C1E16] transition-colors rounded-xl font-medium

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#EAE5D9] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-[#EAE5D9] rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:border-[#D97757] hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#EAE5D9] text-[#2C1E16] rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D97757]/20 focus:border-[#D97757] transition-all

sidebar_cart.wrapper: bg-white border-l border-[#EAE5D9] h-full flex flex-col shadow-[-4px_0_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-0.5) and border color shifts for interactive elements. High contrast shifts for buttons.
motion_and_interactions.active: Scale down slightly (scale-95) for tactile feedback.
motion_and_interactions.list_animation: Staggered fade-in for POS items to avoid jarring layout shifts when changing categories.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Keep stroke consistent.

hero_login.description: Two drinks with latte art on a table. Use for the login screen background (half screen).

placeholder_pastry.description: Coffee and pastries on a windowsill. Use for default pastry/food items.

placeholder_coffee.description: White ceramic mug with coffee. Use for default coffee beverage items.

filter_coffee_specialty.description: Brewing coffee. Can be used for banner or specialty item.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against #FDFBF7 or white meets APCA contrast standards. Do not use pure gray for text, use the warm #8A7969 or #5C4A3D.
accessibility.focus: All focus states must use a 2px ring of #D97757 with an offset. No `outline-none` without `focus:ring` replacements.
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory `data-testid` on all POS item cards, cart buttons, checkout flow inputs, and admin navigation.

surface_strategies.pos_menu_area: Solid background (#FDFBF7), relying on generous padding (p-6) to separate categories. No heavy shadows.
surface_strategies.cart_sidebar: Solid white (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px left border (#EAE5D9) and slight ambient shadow to distinguish it from the menu area. This creates a 'receipt' feel.
surface_strategies.checkout_modal: Solid background, soft shadow (shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,30,22,0.12)]), rounded-3xl. Do not use generic glassmorphism here, it needs to look like a physical receipt/invoice.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento layouts to allow for high creative flexibility. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to match the 'Cards' and 'Buttons' specs.
Implement the POS Menu as a responsive grid (`pos_grid`) where products have ample tap targets (essential for POS on tablets).
Cart must be permanently visible on desktop in a right-side sidebar. Mobile can use a bottom sheet or a toggleable sidebar.
The admin dashboard must maintain the same warm color palette but use a 'Control Room' grid for dense analytics data (e.g., Today's Sales, Inventory).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
DO NOT use a default dark sidebar. The application should feel light, bright, and airy.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive components like 'add-to-cart-espresso', 'checkout-btn', 'login-submit'.
